header.headline: IR v66 Failure Decision Tree
header.subtitle: Start from the first failing gate. Do not debug every symptom at once.

start.title: Which gate failed first?
start.body: Classify the failure before touching unrelated subsystems.

left.title: Contract / Build
left.body: Kernel maps, scripts, or build contracts drifted.

center.title: Matrix / Probe
center.body: A specific validation row or probe path failed.

right.title: Parity / Decode
right.body: Parity or longer decode behavior regressed.

left_outcome.title: Contract Branch
left_outcome.body: Diff scripts, kernel maps, and build inputs first.

center_outcome.title: Matrix Branch
center_outcome.body: Rerun the failing row in isolation and inspect artifacts.

right_outcome.title: Parity Branch
right_outcome.body: Check runtime availability and parity drift before anything else.

finish.title: Finish
finish.body: Once the branch is green, rerun the full gate and archive the result.

footer.note: Operational rule: isolate one failing branch at a time.
